name: SubwayCine
author: IMB11
description:
SubwayCine is a cinematic creation tool for [Subway Builder](https://subwaybuilder.com). I don't think there is a point explaining how to use it because it is pretty self-explanatory!

- Per node easings
- Easily edit camera pos, look target, orientation and FOV for each node
- Save/Import using JSON
- "Preview" which hides all UI and plays the cinematic.
